titleStmt.title: SII 26.770: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 770. (A.R. No. 719 of 1909.) ĀLAMBĀKKAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara, etc.

It records a gift of land, made tax-free, to the temple of the god Śrī-Madurāntakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Rājēndraśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu, by the sabhai of the place, to provide for food offerings at all the three sandhis (services) to the deity. It is stated that this gift was made sometime previously and the record was engraved on the northern wall of the ardha-maṇḍapa of the temple itself. It is further stated that the land was reclaimed and cultivated by a certain Kantayan, the agent of the sēnāpati Rājēndraśōḻa-Brahmārāyar, and the land was named after the sēnāpati, as Vipranārāyaṇa-maśakkal.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉnivaḷara Irunilamaṭan=tayum porccayappāvaiyum cirttanicce
lviyum tan porun=teviyarāki Inpuṟa neṭutiyal Ūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟai nāṭum tuṭarva
na velippaṭar vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ
maṇṇaik kaṭakkamum porutaṭar Īḻattaraiyar tamuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻil mu
ṭiyum munnavar pakkal tennavar vaiytta cun=taramuṭiyum In=tiranāramum teṇṭicai Īḻamaṇ
ṭala muḻuvalum Eṟipaṭaikkeraḷan muṟaimaiyil cūṭuṅkulatanamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum
ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatir velait tol peruṅkāval palpaḻan=tivum ceruviṟ cinavil
irupattorukālaraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñ cān=timaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya ce
mpoṟṟiruttakumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkana
ḷapperum pukaḻoṭu piṭiyaliraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamum navanatik kulapperumalaikaḷum
vikkiramavira cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirvaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamu kāmiṭai vaḷanāmaṇaik ko
ṇaiyum veñcilai virar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaippaḻana mācuṇitecamum Ayā kirtti
ya kaṉkāveyil caṉtiraṉ tolkulat tantirarataṉai viḷaiyamarkkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu
palattoṭu niṟaikula taṉakkuvaiyuvak kiṭṭarum ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭavi[ṣa]yamum pūcuraceṉakkocalai
nāṭum taṉmapālaṉai vemuṉai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇu
ṟattākki tikkaṇa kirttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovin=tacan=taṉ maāviḻin=toṭa taṅkaā tacāral vaṅkaāḷa
tecamum toṭukaḻal caṅkuyoṭṭal mahivāḷaṉai veñcamar vaḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiral
yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramunittila neṭuṅkaṭal Uttaralāṭamum veṟimātiratte
ṟipunal kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuḷppalakalañ celuttic caṅkirāmavicaiyot
tuṅkapanmanākiya kaṭārattaraiyaṉa navākayam porukaṭaṟ kumpaṟkariyoṭum ka paṭutturi
maiyiṟ piṟakkap porunetittiṟakkamum Ārttavannakar nakar nakarporttoḻil vāca
vi viccātiratoraṇamum moyttaḷir punamaṇipputavamum kanamaṇikkatavamum
nanaiyum panmalaiyūraiyaṟṟon malaiyūrum Āḻ
ṅkamum kalaṅkāvalviṉai Ilaṅkācokamum koppuṟu
kaḷamum kāvalam puricai mevili paṅkamum viḷappantūṟuṭaivaḷappantuṟu
pukaḻtalait takkolamum titamāval vinai mātamaṅkalamum kalāmu
tirkka Ilāmuritecamum tenakkalar poḻil mānakkavāramum toṭukaṭal kāva
l kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramum māpporutaṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakecaripa(ṟ)nma(ā)rāna Uṭaiyār
śrīrājentracoḷadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10 3 Āvatu rājendraciṅka vaḷanāṭṭu śrīmaturān=taka
ccaturvvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom Emmūr śrīkayilāsamuṭaiya mahādevarkku muṉ nāṅka
ḷ Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭutta nilam kiḻakku nālu Ellaiyum peci Ikkoyili
l Arddhama
ṇṭapattu va
ṭa cuvarile ka
lveṭṭik kiṭa
n=ta nilattil me
ṟkaṭaiya mukkāl
nilam senāpati
rājendracoḷabrahmamā
rāyar perā
l vipranārāyaṇa macakkal E
ṉṟu Ivar kanmi kan=tayan ṉe
l viḷaiyattiruntu vicca
nilattil bhoham ko
ṇṭu mūṉṟu san=tiyum potu
nānāḻi Arici tiruvamutukku
veṇṭuvatellām ko
ṇṭu śrīkoyiluṭaiyārum
devar kanmikaḷum Ituceyvi
kkakaṭavarkaḷāka can=tirātittavaṟ
nibandham ceytom sabhai
yom panmāheśvara
rakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 26.770 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
